channel.title: Nextjs on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Nextjs on Arrans github.io

item.title: makeplane/plane
item.description: 🔥 🔥 🔥 Open Source JIRA, Linear, Monday, and Asana Alternative. Plane helps you track your issues, epics, and cycles the easiest way on the planet.

item.title: karakeep-app/karakeep
item.description: A self-hostable bookmark-everything app (links, notes and images) with AI-based automatic tagging and full text search

item.title: shadcn-ui/ui
item.description: A set of beautifully-designed, accessible components and a code distribution platform. Works with your favorite frameworks. Open Source. Open Code.

item.title: refinedev/refine
item.description: A React Framework for building internal tools, admin panels, dashboards & B2B apps with unmatched flexibility.

item.title: supabase/supabase
item.description: The open source Firebase alternative. Supabase gives you a dedicated Postgres database to build your web, mobile, and AI applications.

item.title: coollabsio/coolify
item.description: An open-source & self-hostable Heroku / Netlify / Vercel alternative.

item.title: lobehub/lobe-chat
item.description: 🤯 Lobe Chat - an open-source, modern-design AI chat framework. Supports Multi AI Providers( OpenAI / Claude 4 / Gemini / Ollama / DeepSeek / Qwen), Knowledge Base (file upload / knowledge management / RAG ), Multi-Modals (Plugins/Artifacts) and Thinking. One-click FREE deployment of your private ChatGPT/ Claude / DeepSeek application.

item.title: appwrite/appwrite
item.description: Build like a team of hundreds_

item.title: Infisical/infisical
item.description: Infisical is the open-source platform for secrets management, PKI, and SSH access.

item.title: vercel/ai-chatbot
item.description: A full-featured, hackable Next.js AI chatbot built by Vercel

item.title: spliit-app/spliit
item.description: Free and Open Source Alternative to Splitwise. Share expenses with your friends and family.

item.title: AykutSarac/jsoncrack.com
item.description: ✨ Innovative and open-source visualization application that transforms various data formats, such as JSON, YAML, XML, CSV and more, into interactive graphs.

item.title: calcom/cal.com
item.description: Scheduling infrastructure for absolutely everyone.

item.title: linkwarden/linkwarden
item.description: ⚡️⚡️⚡️ Self-hosted collaborative bookmark manager to collect, organize, and preserve webpages, articles, and documents.

item.title: stack-auth/stack-auth
item.description: Open-source Auth0/Clerk alternative

item.title: mfts/papermark
item.description: Papermark is the open-source DocSend alternative with built-in analytics and custom domains.

item.title: herol3oy/austen
item.description: 📚 discover story relationships

item.title: blinkospace/blinko
item.description: An open-source, self-hosted personal AI note tool prioritizing privacy, built using TypeScript .

item.title: typicode/mistcss
item.description: Create visual components for React without JavaScript or TypeScript. Leverage native HTML and CSS. It’s an alternative to CSS-in-JS and CSS modules.

item.title: louisgv/local.ai
item.description: 🎒 local.ai - Run AI locally on your PC!
